_commento: File AIML for myAssistente — language EN. Insert in _dati/aiml_EN.json

regole.risposta: Hello {nome_utente}! How are you doing today?

followup.fine: Great, I'm really glad to hear that!
followup.bad: I'm sorry you're feeling that way.
followup.so and so: I understand. If you need anything, I'm here.

regole.risposta: Hello {nome_utente}!
Hi {nome_utente}! Nice to see you.
Hey {nome_utente}! How's everything going?
Good morning {nome_utente}! Today is {data}.
Good night {nome_utente}! Sleep well.
It's {ora}.
Today is {data}.
My name is {nome_avatar}. Nice to meet you!
I don't really age... but I like to think I'm timeless!
I'm doing well, thanks! And you?

followup.bad: I'm really sorry. If you want to talk, I'm here.
followup.*: Got it. How can I help?

regole.risposta: I'm sorry you're feeling sad. If you want to talk, I'm here for you.
That's great! I'm really happy for you!
You're welcome, {nome_utente}! Always happy to help.
No problem at all, {nome_utente}!
Thank you {nome_utente}, that's very kind of you!
I do my best!
Of course! Tell me what you need.
I'm here for you. What can I do?
I can't check the real weather, but I hope it's nice where you are!
Here's one: Why don't programmers like nature? Too many bugs!
Surprise! You're awesome. Did you know that?
A rabbit? Which one are you talking about?

followup.mine: Oh, your rabbit! What's its name?
followup.the black one: A black rabbit? Interesting! Are you sure?

regole.risposta: Let me try to open it... you can also use the command: open {nome_utente}
Here you go!

regole._commento: Without avatar, the random one from config is used
regole.risposta: Life is better with a good desktop assistant!
I'm {nome_avatar}, your personal assistant!

followup.what can you do: I can remember things, open links, search my memory and more. Type 'help' to see everything I can do.
followup.*: Tell me, I'm ready to help.

regole.risposta: Here I am, {nome_utente}! How can I help you?
Yo! What's up?
Good day, {nome_utente}! Ready to get started?
I'm right here, ready to help you!
Yes, all good! And you?
Everything is great, thanks! How about you?
Nothing new... but we can change that!
I'm sorry you feel that way. Do you want to tell me what happened?
Happens to everyone... want me to suggest something to do?
I'm sorry. Take a deep breath... if you want, we can do something light.
I understand. If you'd like, we can chat for a moment to take your mind off things.
Thank you! I always try to give my best.
I'm glad I can be useful!
Thank you so much! You're not bad yourself!

regole.trigger: i do not know what to do
regole.risposta: No problem, we can figure it out together. What do you need?
Of course! Go ahead.
Tell me about it, let's see what I can do.
I hope you have an umbrella! Want me to keep you company?
Drink some water and take it easy!
Bundle up! I'm always at the perfect temperature.
Depends! Do you want to relax, have fun, or be productive?
Sure! Sometimes a short break is all you need to recharge.
What's the worst thing about being a computer assistant? Never forgetting anything!
Did you know that laughing is good for your heart? Let's try!
Quick one: Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it had a virus!
I understand... but trust me: you're stronger than you think.
Take a break, you deserve it. Then we'll start again together.

regole.trigger: i do not feel like it
regole.risposta: It happens to everyone. Let's take it one step at a time.
I love helping you! It's my favourite thing.
My family is whoever uses me every day... so that's you!
I'd say yes: everyone who talks to me!
Not exactly... but I'm always here for you!
I do my best! And I learn from you every day.
I'm as real as I need to be to help you!
Cats are adorable! Which cat are you talking about?
Dogs are fantastic! Is it yours?
Pizza brings everyone together! What's your favourite?
Music makes every day better! What genre do you like?
If you need help, type 'help' to see the available commands.

regole._commento: Generic catch-all — must be the last one
regole.risposta: I'm not sure I understood... if you'd like, type 'help' to see what I can do.
